description: Full-horizon promotion benchmark suite for RBC calibration autoresearch. Use this slower manifest as a promotion gate after a policy wins on the fast benchmark suite. This version strengthens robustness by including both baseline and ATP-guarded full-horizon cases, and by using more than 2 optimization trials per case.

cases.name: full_horizon_baseline_seed29
cases.description: Primary full-horizon mechanistic fit check with the baseline seed and no curve forcing.

cases.name: full_horizon_baseline_seed42
cases.description: Full-horizon robustness check under an alternate search seed, still without curve forcing.

cases.name: full_horizon_atp_guarded_seed29
cases.description: Promotion case emphasizing adenylate pool retention and ATP stability over the full horizon.

cases.name: full_horizon_atp_guarded_seed42
cases.description: Full-horizon ATP-guarded robustness check under an alternate seed.
